description: Synthetic RTL verification failure dataset for prioritization and analytics tasks.

columns.name: failure_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each failure instance.

columns.name: module
columns.description: Hardware module where the failure occurred.

columns.name: severity
columns.description: Failure severity label assigned by verification triage.

columns.name: coverage_drop
columns.description: Verification coverage drop caused by the failure.

columns.name: frequency
columns.description: Observed frequency of occurrence across regression runs.

columns.name: recurrence
columns.description: Number of repeat appearances after the first occurrence.

columns.name: fix_time
columns.description: Estimated engineering effort to fix the issue.

columns.name: log_message
columns.description: Representative RTL regression log message tied to the failure.
